rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELLEN NINA POHL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Extending Time To Make Election Pursuant To Probate Code 13502 [Prob. C. 13502(B)]; Election By Surviving Spouse To Have Surviving Spouse'S Interest In Community And Separate Property Administered Pursuant To Terms Of Decedent'S Will
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The issues to be cleared/addressed. (1) Please clarify which specific portion the surviving spouse wishes to have administered under this section. Paragraph 3, line 12-13 sets forth that the surviving spouse elects to probate a portion of Decedent's CP and all of Decedent's SP, which seems to be under sec. 13502(a)(1); however, the petition caption sets forth that the surviving spouse's interest in CP and SP, citing sec. 13502(b). Need clarification. The Court may require a written election specifying the information. (2) On page 2 of the petition, CP and SP are listed among the assets in the I&A, even though the I&A did not include this information. Sec.8850(c). The Court will determine whether the corrected I&A must be filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LYNCH FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement And General Mutual Release
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared/addressed: (1) The petition may need to specify which provisions of the Trust authorize the trustees to implement each part of this agreement. (2) The Court may inquire further on how this agreement among contingent beneficiaries would benefit the vested trust beneficiary, Peggy Lynch, who is also the conservatee in PCN-24-307711 (3) Notice of Hearing was incomplete in the date of mailing in #4 of POS. Also, the notice was not mailed directly to Barton Lynch but sent to his counsel in care of. CRC 7.51(a)(2). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
